title: PokeFood
body:
### **As the new 1.2 updates (actual and comming) overhaul old systems PLEASE read the changelogs before updating, blocks may disappear from your worlds !**
## **ALWAYS MAKE BACKUP BEFORE ADDING OR UPDATING MODS !!!!!**

**The next PokeFood update FESTIVITIES is progressing nicely, but it is still in development !**

*Btw, the code name doesn't represent what is in the update ! It's just based on the update's final banner*

![FESTIVITIES](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/7xozn6tsqfbk6jm9h2j9v/PokeFood-FESTIVITIES.png?rlkey=v9sb184a8vshpji5m4tlbommo&dl=1)

***If you find a bug, please report it ! i'll fix it asap !***

 

***This mod aim to add food to the [COBBLEMON](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) mod, meaning some features won't be implemented untill sometimes.***

***Also fabric isn't supported for now and may never be.***

Almost all the food can be crafted either on a crafting table, or the mod's custom crafting systems, It's higly recomended to use **[JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)** (for normal recipes) and **[PATCHOULI](https://modrinth.com/mod/patchouli)** (you'll be able to craft some books that explains most of what can be made in pokefood (foodwise only for now)

 

**[Also check the brand new curry extension for this mod here !](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pokefood-curry)**


![List of food in the mod](https://www.dropbox.com/s/tcxpkw6x7pzkh59/banner.png?dl=1)


**The mod will never be backported !**

**It is highly recommanded to keep the mod up to date as much as possible as it either implement new bug fixes or add new content, if you are interested with my naming process it is as follow:**


- X.... the first number is **the main version**, it change only when a specific goal is reached (ex 0.9 to 1.0 when all that was planned was fully added);
- ..X.. the second number is the **importance version**, it change only when a great amount of change appens (ex:1.0 to 1.1);
- ....X the letter, it indicate the **hotfix / bugfix or added content that fix problems** or isn't big enough to be kept for a new update.
